symptom_vector: DNS lookup failure causing service connectivity issues, DNS resolution timeout, incorrect DNS response, DNS server unreachable, truncated DNS packet

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: Component [checkoutservice] experienced [server_error_ratio, error_ratio, dns, http.resp.status, 302] fault.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [checkoutservice] (From Ground Truth instance field)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [frontend] in Trace (From GT key_observations trace subtype latency_anomalies with keyword frontend)
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [failure] in Log (From GT key_observations log with keyword failure)
Step 4: Check Observation - Found keyword [http.resp.status, 302] in Log (From GT key_observations log with keyword http.resp.status, 302)
Step 5: Check Observation - Found keyword [Internal] in Log (From GT key_observations log with keyword Internal)
Step 6: Check Observation - Found keyword [request error] in Log (From GT key_observations log with keyword request error)
Step 7: Check Observation - Found keyword [rpc, error] in Log (From GT key_observations log with keyword rpc, error)
Step 8: Check Observation - Found keyword [transport, Error, while, dialing] in Log (From GT key_observations log with keyword transport, Error, while, dialing)
Step 9: Check Observation - Found keyword [unavailable] in Log (From GT key_observations log with keyword unavailable)

Step 10: Check Observation - Found keyword [error, error_ratio, server_error, server_error_ratio] in Metric (From GT key_observations metric with keyword error, error_ratio, server_error, server_error_ratio)
Step 11: Derive Root Cause - Based on above features, determined cause is [server_error_ratio, error_ratio, dns, http.resp.status, 302] (From Ground Truth key_metrics)

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Trace data shows frontend service with latency anomalies in checkoutservice calls
critical_checks.instruction: Search for trace entries where service_name contains 'frontend' and operation_name contains 'hipstershop.CheckoutService/PlaceOrder' with increased duration

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Log entries containing 'failure' keyword in error messages
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'failure' in log messages, particularly in frontend service logs

critical_checks.expected_pattern: HTTP response status code 302 appearing in logs
critical_checks.instruction: Search for 'http.resp.status' with value '302' in log entries
Search for keyword 'Internal' in error messages, particularly in RPC error descriptions
Search for exact phrase 'request error' in log messages
Search for 'rpc' and 'error' keywords appearing together in log messages

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Specific error message: 'transport: Error while dialing' with DNS lookup failure details
critical_checks.instruction: Search for exact phrase 'transport: Error while dialing' in log messages, particularly from frontend service

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Log entries containing 'Unavailable' status or error codes
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'Unavailable' in error messages, particularly in RPC error codes

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Metrics showing error_ratio and server_error_ratio spikes from 0% to ~49% for checkoutservice
critical_checks.instruction: Check metric data for checkoutservice showing error_ratio and server_error_ratio values increasing significantly during fault period
